title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
description: Attackers could flood the system with a large volume of requests, overwhelming its resources and causing a denial of service. This could be amplified through techniques like DDoS attacks.
attack_vector: Large volume of requests designed to exhaust server resources.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and throttling mechanisms.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic.
